---
title: "Welcome to My Analytics Lab"
sidebar: false 
---

Hello! My name is Saltuk Buğrahan.

This is my personal webpage.

Please stay tuned to follow my works on data analytics, blog posts, and more.

You can find my social media here!\
\
<https://www.linkedin.com/in/saltuk-bu%C4%9Frahan-ta%C5%9Fdemir-148b86311/>\
